seoTitle: How to Change Confluence Font Size (2026)
metaDescription: Adjust text size in Confluence using the editor's typography dropdown, table cell scaling, and keyboard shortcuts for consistent formatting.
intro: Tiny, unreadable text or oversized headings can throw off the visual hierarchy of an otherwise well-written page. This guide covers adjusting font sizes in Confluence, from the main typography dropdown to scaling text inside tables, so your documentation stays consistent and readable.

steps.heading: Highlight the text block
steps.body: Open your target documentation page, enter edit mode, and highlight the specific text you want to resize.

steps.heading: Open the text style dropdown
steps.body: Move to the upper editor toolbar and click the text style dropdown panel.

steps.heading: Select a preset scale
steps.body: Choose from pre-set layout scales to transform paragraphs into headings or adjust body text size.

steps.heading: Use advanced sizing if needed
steps.body: Open the advanced font sub-menu to apply exact point sizes or custom spacing for more precise control.

steps.heading: Scale table text separately
steps.body: Highlight data inside tables and use the mini pop-up editor to scale table content down if it's too large for the grid.

steps.heading: Publish and check readability
steps.body: Click the blue Publish button at the top right to save your typography changes live.

faq.question: Can I set an exact point size instead of using presets?
faq.answer: Yes, the advanced font sub-menu lets you apply exact point sizes or custom spacing beyond the standard preset scales.

faq.question: Why does my table text look too big compared to the rest of the page?
faq.answer: Table text can be scaled independently using the mini pop-up editor that appears when you highlight content inside a table cell.

faq.question: Will my font size changes look consistent on mobile?
faq.answer: Confluence's editor uses relative sizing to keep proportions consistent, but it's still worth checking your page on a mobile viewport before publishing.

faq.question: Is there a keyboard shortcut for changing font size?
faq.answer: Yes, structural keyboard commands can step font levels up or down without needing to open the toolbar menu each time.
